title: Kazzmon's MageCraft
description: A Weapons Expansion Pack with a Magical Theme! Includes various Wands, Scepters, Staves, and Tomes that utilizes your XP for Magic attacks.
body:
Here's my brand new datapack, MageCraft, which introduces Magic-themed weapons that makes use of the Experience Points in Minecraft.

- Various Magic-themed weapons can be crafted using the Crafting Table, with their respective Crafting Recipes over at the **Image Gallery**.

- The Magic system introduced in this datapack utilizes the in-game XP, where different weapons can drain your XP at certain amounts, and can have XP Level requirements to use them.

---

**Weapons**

- Wands

    - Emerald Wand
    - Mist Wand
    - Shadow Wand
    - Sparkle Wand
>
- Scepters

    - Amethyst Scepter
    - Emerald Scepter
    - Pearl Scepter
    - Luminous Scepter
>
- Staves

    - Crystal Staff
    - Prism Staff
    - Tempest Staff
    - Staff of the Abyss
    - Staff of the Sea
    - Starlight Staff
>
- Tomes

    - Flare Tome
    - Soulspark Tome
    - Withering Tome
    - Astral Codex
    - Dragon's End
>
- Swords

    - Crystal Katana
    - Gemspark Blade
    - Emerald Saber
    - Flame Saber
    - Obsidiana
    - Sculk Seeker
    - Enderstrike
    - Astral Katana
>
- Axes

    - Amethyst Axe
    - Echoing Hatchet
    - Blazing Halberd
    - Riftspace Battle Axe
>
- Bows

    - Soulfire Caster
    - Ocean's Wrath
    - Frozen Hunter
    - Golden Electric Bow
    - Dragon's Bolt
>
- Crossbows

    - Abyss Ranger
    - Red Sparkler
    - Void Seeker
>
---
*You can check out a brief description about the weapon and its Crafting Recipe over at the Image Gallery. More detailed descriptions are included in the Weapon's Tooltip in-game.*
